title: Astronium zongolicum
intro: Astronium zongolicum, also known as Mexican cedar, is a tree species native to the tropical regions of Mexico and Central America, belonging to the family Anacardiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, pain, and inflammation, due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and analgesic properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The bioactive constituents of Astronium zongolicum include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Astronium zongolicum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to alleviate symptoms of fever, pain, and respiratory issues.
